subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attired in the brocade of love! In this Day of the Ancient Beauty and Cycle of the Most Great Name, may my spirit be a sacrifice for His faithful servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طراز دیباج الحب در این دور جمال قدم و کور اسم اعظم روحی لعباده المخلصین
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement
